## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Minimal reproduction

A small snippet using `defineSignal` / `defineState` / `defineFlow` that demonstrates
the problem. The smaller and more self-contained, the faster we can help.

```typescript
// your reproduction here
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include any error messages or stack traces).

## Additional context

Anything else that might help.
